session_note: S52 — autonomous batch run approved upfront by user. Standard-tier batch (3 priorities + P0): P1 atomic PLACE_FROM_FREE action + dragLock interpolation (joiner input asymmetry fix), P2 raid charge cycle-no-consume amendment (LOCKED §13.11 amended per user ask), P3 duckMusic Web Audio scheduled restore (S51 Gemini CHECK #1 carry). Council R1 deliberated (Battle Ledger 7 rows + 6 Δ). PRIME-AUDIT pass complete. User explicit go upfront for autonomous overnight execution: 'I will approve your autonomous run because iil be heading to bed.'
council_battle_ledger: 7 rows + 6 Δ. C1 (Grok#8+Gemini#1 CONVERGENT BLOCKER) ADOPT — bump PROTOCOL_VERSION 2→3 + add PLACE_FROM_FREE to KNOWN_GAME_ACTION_TYPES_RECORD. Old peers fail HELLO same-deploy pattern (S22 P3 precedent). C2 (Grok#1 BLOCKER) ADOPT — remote-origin intents IGNORE joiner's targetPrimitiveId, host always re-picks via existing pickHostTargetPrimitive. C3 (Grok#2 BLOCKER) ADOPT — reducer order makePrimitiveFromSpark FIRST then world.freeSparks.delete + world.primitives.set. C4 (Gemini#2 HIGH) ADOPT — extend dragLock with pendingPlaceFromFree { sparkId, sentAt } 300ms TTL in controls; interpolation skips both AttractDrag and pendingCommit sparks (closes 1-frame blink). C5 (Gemini#3 HIGH) ADOPT — PLACE_FROM_FREE increments same rejectReasons buckets as 2-action path. C6 (Gemini#5 MED) ADOPT — extract shared validatePlacementPos helper used by both placeFromFree.ts and placePrimitive.ts (DRY). C7 (Gemini#4 MED) ADOPT — audit world.test.ts cycle-no-consume test topology; rewrite to use real geometric cycle if mocked. Rejected: Grok#5 (cycle-charge balance — user authorized override), Grok#6/9/10/11 (false positives — non-hostile cycle still 0 via computeBaseCharge; debugOverlay reads world directly no desync; stiffnessTier TS-typed; mid-drag save no regression). Δ1 RuntimeVerify Web Audio scheduled restore on suspend — W3C §4.3.2 ctx-time freezes during suspend, automation queue resumes correctly. Δ2 pendingCommit TTL=300ms vs typical RTT/2 50-100ms; cleared on snapshot or TTL. Δ3 mid-deploy old-host new-joiner surfaces as Connection-lost overlay; refresh required. Δ4 LMB-spam idempotent (race-reject). Δ5 spawner-zone uses action.placementPos (authoritative). Δ6 (Gemini#8 LOW DEFER) host visibility of joiner drag = ATTRACT_DRAG_POS wire message at 10Hz, S53+ carry.
prime_audit: 6 deltas surfaced + handled in PDR. (1) Web Audio behavior on tab-blur resume — W3C spec §4.3.2 confirms ctx.currentTime freezes during suspend; setTargetAtTime automation queue continues from suspend point on resume. Fix is correct (per Gemini #6 with spec citation). (2) pendingCommit lock cleanup — 300ms TTL OR cleared on first post-LMB-up snapshot, whichever earlier. Self-correcting if network drops. (3) Mid-deploy peer mismatch — Connection-lost overlay; refresh required. Acceptable (atomic GH Pages deploy). (4) LMB-spam — race-reject handles second/third clicks at same spark id. Diagnostics OK. (5) PlacementPos vs spark.pos — was already authoritative in S46 P2 amendment, unifying is byte-equivalent. (6) Cycle test topology — audit existing test fixture; if it's a mocked split, rewrite to construct real geometric cycle.

priorities.label: S52 P1 — Atomic PLACE_FROM_FREE + dragLock interpolation (input asymmetry fix)
priorities.check_method: Atomic NEW action src/state/placeFromFree.ts (210 LOC reducer) collapses the legacy LMB-up PICKUP_SPARK + PLACE_PRIMITIVE 2-intent burst into one. Validation FIRST (placementPos shape via isPosShape, spark.state==='Free' race-reject, player.kind==='Idle' race-reject, remote-origin isValidPlacementPos canvas-bounds + REASONABLE_PICKUP_REACH=600 reach plausibility, spawner-zone hard block, isInsideEnemyTerritory hard block, remote-origin host re-pick via pickHostTargetPrimitive + collectHostMergeCandidates IGNORING joiner's hint per Council C2 BLOCKER, local-origin target-existence + same-color demotion). Then ATOMIC commit: snap spark.pos to placementPos, fsmPickup Idle→Carrying, spark.state→Carried, delegate to placePrimitive (which cannot now reject — all preconditions pre-verified per Council C3 BLOCKER contract). PROTOCOL_VERSION bumped 2→3 in src/net/protocol.ts; KNOWN_GAME_ACTION_TYPES_RECORD adds PLACE_FROM_FREE (parseNetMessage HELLO check fails closed for mismatched peers — S22 P3 same-deploy pattern). src/input/controls.ts onUp LMB-up branch: PICKUP+PLACE 2-dispatch replaced with single PLACE_FROM_FREE dispatch + sets pendingPlaceFromFree { sparkId, sentAt } 300ms TTL state. NEW getDragLockedSparkId() returns active AttractDrag sparkId OR pendingPlaceFromFree sparkId within TTL OR null. src/net/sync.ts interpolatePositions accepts optional dragLockedSparkId; skips lerp for that spark. src/main.ts threads controls.getDragLockedSparkId() to clientSync.interpolateInto. Tests: src/state/placeFromFree.test.ts NEW (16 tests covering happy path anchor/bonded, all reject paths preserving rejectReasons buckets, remote-origin re-pick + stale-id ignored, atomicity contract — territory + spawner-zone rejects do NOT leave joiner in Carrying state); src/net/sync.test.ts +2 dragLock tests (locked spark not lerped, unlocked sparks still lerped); src/net/protocol.test.ts version updates. Verification: 815/815 unit tests GREEN (+20 from S52); previously-flaky stress.test.ts also GREEN. tsc -b --noEmit clean. npm run build → bundle 499.74 KB (+2.07 KB vs S51 close, 0.26 KB headroom under 500 KB charter). Push: 7c446a2 → origin/master. CI re-run pending; e2e regression preserved by KEEPING legacy PICKUP_SPARK + PLACE_PRIMITIVE handlers for RMB ConnectDrag flow.

priorities.label: S52 P2 — Raid charge cycle-no-consume amendment (LOCKED §13.11)
priorities.check_method: User-authorized LOCKED §13.11 PRIME-AUDIT B amendment. Pre-S52 cycle-bond severs cost 0 charges per the cycle-no-consume rule (split.del.size===0 → 0 charges); user verbatim ask 'each raid point = break 1 connection no 5' inverts the exception. Implementation: src/state/world.ts SEVER_BOND case (line 386-396) — removed ternary `chargeToConsume = split.del.size === 0 ? 0 : computeBaseCharge(...)` → uniform `chargeToConsume = computeBaseCharge(...)`. Self-sever (computeBaseCharge=0 for same-color both endpoints) remains the only 0-cost path. src/state/disruptionManager.ts header doc + computeBaseCharge JSDoc updated. LOCKED_DECISIONS.md §13.11 PRIME-AUDIT B block AMENDED with strikethrough-style historical-text preservation + S52 amendment block (cycle exception REMOVED, strategic-balance shift noted: attackers can no longer chip cycle bonds for free; defenders' triangulated cells now cost actual raid charges). Test-coverage line in §13.11 updated. src/state/world.test.ts cycle-bond test: assertion flipped (disruptionCharges).toBe(1)→.toBe(0); description renamed cycle-no-consume → cycle-consume (S52 amendment). Council C7 (Gemini #4 MED) audit confirmed: existing test uses a REAL geometric triangle (a-b-c-a closed with synthBond), NOT a mocked split — full integration test through dispatch+severSplit, satisfying Gemini's robust-topology requirement. Verification: 815/815 unit tests GREEN. world.test.ts 20/20. tsc -b --noEmit clean. npm run build → 499.74 → 499.73 KB (-0.01 KB; removed branch). Push: 20e0007 → origin/master.

priorities.label: S52 P3 — duckMusic AudioContext suspend fix (S51 Gemini CHECK #1)
priorities.check_method: S51 Gemini CHECK #1 carry-forward fix. Pre-S52 duckMusic used setTimeout(restoreFn, durationMs) wall-clock scheduling; restoreFn read audioContext.currentTime at TIMEOUT-FIRE time. If tab blurred mid-duck, ctx.currentTime froze during suspend, setTimeout fired at wall-time, restore landed at stale ctx-time → abrupt restore on tab refocus. Fix in src/render/audioManager.ts duckMusic: removed `duckTimeout` state variable, removed setTimeout closure (15 LOC); replaced with `musicGainNode.gain.setTargetAtTime(restoreTarget, newEnd, 0.150)` queued at SCHEDULE time via Web Audio automation. The Web Audio automation queue is ctx-time relative — pauses with ctx.suspend(), resumes on ctx.resume() — so the duck persists through suspend and restores at the originally-scheduled relative ctx-time without abrupt cuts. W3C Web Audio API §4.3.2 confirms currentTime freezes during suspend AND queued automation honors ctx-time (cited by Gemini AUDITOR #6 LOW). cancelScheduledValues(now) call site already clears any prior queued restore so new schedule replaces it cleanly. _resetAudioForTest amended to clear duckEndCtxTime (was previously left dangling). Verification: 815/815 unit tests GREEN (nextDuckEndCtxTime pure-helper tests unchanged — schedule-extension semantic preserved; only restore mechanism changed). tsc -b --noEmit clean. Bundle 499.73 → 499.60 KB (-0.13 KB; removed setTimeout closure + state). Council R1 PRIME-AUDIT Δ1 RuntimeVerify confirmed by spec citation; tab-blur smoke deferred to user 2-peer playtest carry-forward. Push: e529c4e → origin/master.
